title: NormalizeEntitiesResponse
description: Response emitted by `sqlite-graphrag normalize-entities` on stdout as a single JSON line. Normalizes entity names to kebab-case ASCII; merges colliding names. Exit codes: 0 success, 1 validation error.

action.description: 'normalized' when changes were applied, 'dry_run' when only previewed.

normalized_count.description: Number of entities whose names were updated in place.

merged_count.description: Number of entities that collided with an existing normalized name and were merged into the target.

namespace.description: Namespace the operation was applied to.
